title: Kshudhita Pashan
actors: Arundhati Devi, Soumitra Chatterjee, Chhabi Biswas
plot: The film is adapted from a story called Hungry Stones by Rabindranath Tagore. A tax collector posted to a small town puts up at a mansion feared by the locals because it is haunted. As time passes he grows more consumed by the man...
